mapper.select: SELECT sc.id, sc.product_id AS productId, p.name AS productName, p.image AS productImage, p.description AS productDescription, sc.quantity, p.price, (p.price * sc.quantity) AS totalPrice, sc.selected FROM shopping_cart sc LEFT JOIN product p ON sc.product_id = p.id WHERE sc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sc.created_at DESC
